data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional availability/price snapshot metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Optional availability/price snapshot metadata'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this metadata. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, indicating a gap in coverage for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of optional availability/price snapshot metadata being created or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of optional availability/price snapshot metadata.
